meta.title: The Future of ICS Security Products ... What You Need To Know
meta.description:
Deciding on an ICS security product purchase is difficult now with the large number of new vendors offering asset inventory and detection solutions. To make matters even harder, most of these companies will not be in business in three years and the products will look very different.

This talk tells you what the products will look like in 2 - 5 years, how you should develop and implement a strategy, and how to integrate your OT solutions with the enterprise.
